info.title: Kubeasy API
info.description: Public API for the Kubeasy platform consumed by the web app and the CLI. Web routes use session cookie authentication; CLI routes also accept Bearer token authentication.

SessionAuth.name: better-auth.session_token
SessionAuth.description: Session cookie set after login via better-auth

BearerAuth.description: API key obtained via `kubeasy login`. Used by the CLI and accepted on all public API routes.

tags.name: CLI
tags.description: Routes consumed by the Kubeasy CLI
